title: Conditional Coloring on Mobile App

posts.author: KerwinO (Kerwin Octavo)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

We need the ability to see the color conditional formatting on the mobile app. Currently rows and cells are only highlighted colors when on the desktop app. On Mobile they all appear without color

What are you trying to achieve

We track our orders via Monday.com and use color to highlighted late orders. Our shop users primarily operate with tablets and they don’t see any red highlighting for late orders. They would have to look at the date first
